sections.title: Registration of foreigners
sections.content:
SERVICE: Registration of a foreign citizen for migration registration

DOCUMENTS:
- Passport (original and copy)
- Visa (copy)
- Migration card
- Certificate of place of residence (from the landlord or university)

DEADLINE: 3-5 working days
COST: Free (for students)
OPENING HOURS: Mon-Fri 8:00-20:00, Sat 8:00-13:00

ADDRESS IN KRASNODAR:
st. Krasnaya, 1
Tel: +7-861-XXXXXXXX

sections.title: Compulsory medical insurance (health insurance) policy
sections.content:
SERVICE: Obtaining a compulsory health insurance policy

DOCUMENTS:
- Passport (copy)
- SNILS (if available)
- Certificate of registration

DEADLINE: 1 day
COST: Free

USEFUL INFORMATION:
- With a compulsory medical insurance policy you have access to all medical services
- Valid throughout Russia
- It is recommended to apply in the first week

sections.title: Certificates and certificates
sections.content:
AVAILABLE REFERENCES:
- About place of residence/stay
- About the composition of the family
- Certificate of criminal record (for personal file)
- Extracts from the register

PROCESSING TIME: 1-5 business days
COST: Varies (usually 100-500 rubles)
